mapper.sql: ,IFNULL(STTS_CD.CD_NM, B.BIZ_STTS_CD) AS BIZ_STTS_NM ,IFNULL(INST_CD.CD_NM, B.INST_SE_CD) AS INST_SE_NM ,IFNULL(KND_CD.CD_NM, B.BIZ_KND_CD) AS BIZ_KND_NM ,IFNULL(SE_CD.CD_NM, B.BIZ_SE_CD) AS BIZ_SE_NM

LEFT JOIN cmn_cd STTS_CD ON STTS_CD.CD_GROUP_ID = 'BIZ_STTS_CD' AND STTS_CD.CD = B.BIZ_STTS_CD AND STTS_CD.USE_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN cmn_cd INST_CD ON INST_CD.CD_GROUP_ID = 'INST_SE_CD' AND INST_CD.CD = B.INST_SE_CD AND INST_CD.USE_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN cmn_cd KND_CD ON KND_CD.CD_GROUP_ID = 'BIZ_KND_CD' AND KND_CD.CD = B.BIZ_KND_CD AND KND_CD.USE_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN cmn_cd SE_CD ON SE_CD.CD_GROUP_ID = 'BIZ_SE_CD' AND SE_CD.CD = B.BIZ_SE_CD AND SE_CD.USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.select:
SELECT B.BIZ_ID ,B.CO_ID ,B.BIZ_CD ,B.BIZ_NM ,B.INST_SE_CD ,B.BIZ_KND_CD ,B.BIZ_SE_CD ,B.ORDPL_NM ,DATE_FORMAT(B.CTRT_YMD, '%Y-%m-%d') AS CTRT_YMD ,DATE_FORMAT(B.OTST_YMD, '%Y-%m-%d') AS OTST_YMD ,DATE_FORMAT(B.OTST_YMD, '%Y-%m-%d') AS BIZ_BGNG_YMD ,DATE_FORMAT(B.BIZ_END_YMD, '%Y-%m-%d') AS BIZ_END_YMD ,B.CTRT_AMT ,B.GIVE_MTHD_CN ,DATE_FORMAT(B.GIVE_DDT_YMD, '%Y-%m-%d') AS GIVE_DDT_YMD ,DATE_FORMAT(B.DFRP_GRNTE_BGNG_YMD, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DFRP_GRNTE_BGNG_YMD ,DATE_FORMAT(B.DFRP_GRNTE_END_YMD, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DFRP_GRNTE_END_YMD ,B.RMRK_CN ,B.BIZ_STTS_CD ,DATE_FORMAT(B.REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REG_DT
FROM biz_info B
ORDER BY B.REG_DT DESC, B.BIZ_ID DESC
LIMIT #{firstIndex}, #{recordCountPerPage}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_info ( BIZ_ID, CO_ID, BIZ_CD, BIZ_NM, INST_SE_CD, BIZ_KND_CD, BIZ_SE_CD, ORDPL_NM ,CTRT_YMD, OTST_YMD, BIZ_END_YMD, CTRT_AMT, GIVE_MTHD_CN, GIVE_DDT_YMD ,DFRP_GRNTE_BGNG_YMD, DFRP_GRNTE_END_YMD, RMRK_CN, BIZ_STTS_CD, REG_DT ) VALUES ( #{bizId}, #{coId}, #{bizCd}, #{bizNm}, #{instSeCd}, #{bizKndCd}, #{bizSeCd}, #{ordplNm} ,NULLIF(#{ctrtYmd}, ''), NULLIF(#{otstYmd}, ''), NULLIF(#{bizEndYmd}, ''), #{ctrtAmt}, #{giveMthdCn}, NULLIF(#{giveDdtYmd}, '') ,NULLIF(#{dfrpGrnteBgngYmd}, ''), NULLIF(#{dfrpGrnteEndYmd}, ''), #{rmrkCn} ,COALESCE(NULLIF(#{bizSttsCd}, ''), ( SELECT C.CD FROM cmn_cd C WHERE C.CD_GROUP_ID = 'BIZ_STTS_CD' AND C.USE_YN = 'Y' AND C.DFLT_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY C.SORT_SEQ ASC, C.CD ASC LIMIT 1 )), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT T.TASK_SN ,T.BIZ_ID ,T.STP_CD ,T.TASK_NM ,T.PIC_ID ,T.OUTPUT_FILE_NM ,T.OUTPUT_FILE_NM AS RMRK_CN ,T.OUTPUT_FILE_PATH_NM ,DATE_FORMAT(T.REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REG_DT FROM biz_stp_task T WHERE T.BIZ_ID = #{bizId} ORDER BY T.TASK_SN ASC
